title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 291.150 - Director to make annual report to governor
text:
291.150.  Director to make annual report to governor. — The director shall also make and submit to the governor on or before the last Monday in January in each year, a report containing a full and complete account of the investigations, together with any other suggestions and recommendations he considers to be of value to the people of the state, which shall be laid before the next succeeding general assembly.
(L. 1965 p. 440 § 2)
